covered_sentences: Before, I had asked to be delivered from my island prison.
Now I asked to be delivered from the guilt of my sinful past.
Deliver from sin is a far greater blessing than deliverance from misery.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split composition, 2:1 ratio, right panel larger; left panel: camera positioned low and slightly to the left of the protagonist, looking up at him seated inside the tent shelter, past-state framing — medium shot, protagonist's face tilted upward with a pleading expression, hands clasped, shelter canvas visible at upper frame edge; right panel: camera at eye level from slightly right-rear, medium-close shot, protagonist's face in profile, eyes closed, expression of inner calm and release, soft light on his brow.

Left panel: the protagonist sits cross-legged on the tent floor, hands pressed together in prayer, gaze cast upward; a thought-bubble above him shows a simple sketch of island chains (prison bars over a simplified island outline); right panel: same protagonist shown from a different angle, expression shifted to quiet relief, a faint glow on his chest area suggests inner peace; speech or thought elements absent.

Left panel scene: inside the tent shelter at the cliff base, midday light filtering through the tent flap opening, earthen floor, a wooden crate visible at lower-left edge, canvas walls around. Right panel scene: same tent interior, warmer angled light from the opening, protagonist positioned near the tent wall, a worn Bible resting on the crate beside him.

Left panel: cooler, bluish midday light, tense shadow on the protagonist's face; right panel: warmer golden tone, softer shadow, sense of emotional release.

Protagonist (island castaway version): medium-height adult male, brown short straight hair, short beard, self-made goatskin short jacket, goatskin wide-brimmed hat set aside nearby, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; left panel protagonist's head occupies roughly the upper half of that panel; right panel protagonist fills about two-thirds of panel height. White dividing line between panels, straight, no rounding.

covered_sentences: My mind was now calm and comforted.
I had been on this unhappy island for more than ten months.
I believed that no human being had ever come here before.
I was lord of the whole island.
If I liked, I could call myself king or emperor.
storyboard_assets.prompt:

Protagonist stands with quiet confidence, gaze sweeping outward over the camp and treeline; a thought-bubble above him contains a simplified crown sketch (king/emperor symbol, no text); camp interior visible around him — storage boxes, tool racks, ladder.

Scene: mature wooden-palisade fort camp at the cliff base, full daylight, clear sky, bright warm sunlight; protagonist stands on the inner earth platform near the stake wall, his left hand rests lightly on a wooden stake, stake tops level with his shoulder height.

Bright warm midday light, high key, saturated greens beyond the fence, strong sense of open territory and ownership.

covered_sentences: I had enough wood to build twenty ships, enough food for an army forgotten.
However, if I could not use it, it was of no value to me.
I had enough to eat, so the rest was useless.
I would have gladly given all my money for a little ink.
Because it would have been useful, my life was now much easier than before.

covered_sentences: I thought much more about the blessings of my present life and much less about its misfortunes.
My ink had been gone for some time, my clothes were all worn out.
I made new clothes for myself from the skins of the goats I killed.
This was very slow and difficult work since I had no needle.
